fields.title: python Full Stack Development
fields.description: this internship cover the basic understanding of web development in python
syllabus: Python Environment Setup, IDLE, VS Code, Anaconda Install
Python Basics û Variables, Data Types, Input/Output
Control Flow û if/elif/else, Nested Conditions
Loops û for, while, break, continue, range()
Functions û def, return, *args, **kwargs
Lists, Tuples, Sets, Dictionaries
String Manipulation & File Handling (read/write/append)
Modules, pip, Standard Libraries (os, sys, math, datetime)
OOP û Classes, Objects, Constructor, self
OOP û Inheritance, Encapsulation, Polymorphism
Exception Handling, try/except/finally
HTML & CSS, JS Basics û Structure, Tags, Styling
Django Intro û Install, Project/App Setup, Views, URLs
Django Templates, Forms, Models & Database (SQLite)
Mini Project: Personal Portfolio Website (Django)

Variables, Data Types, Type Casting, Operators

String Operations, Regular Expressions
File Handling, JSON Read/Write, CSV Parsing
OOP û Classes, Objects, Constructor, Methods
Inheritance, Polymorphism, Encapsulation
Modules, Packages, pip, Virtual Environment
HTML5 û Semantic Tags, Forms, Tables, Media
CSS3 û Flexbox, Grid, Responsive Design, Bootstrap
JavaScript Basics
Django Install, MVC, URL Routing, Views, Templates
Django Models, ORM, SQLite, Admin Panel
Django Forms, CRUD Operations, User Input
User Authentication û Login, Register, Logout
Git & Github Commands
Frontend + Backend Integration, Git & GitHub
Full Project: Blog/Task Manager Web App (Django)

fields.title: python Full Stack Development
fields.description: this internship coverd thee advanced webdevelopment concepts and then assigned to be a full stack project.
syllabus: Python Environment Setup, VS Code, Anaconda
Variables, Data Types, Operators, Input/Output
if/elif/else, Nested Conditions, Switch-like patterns
Loops û for, while, nested, break, continue
Functions, Return, *args, **kwargs, Scope
Lambda, Map, Filter, Reduce, List Comprehension
Data Structures û Lists, Tuples, Sets, Dicts
String Manipulation, Slicing, Formatting, f-strings
File Handling û read/write/append, JSON, CSV
Exception Handling û try/except/finally/raise
OOP û Classes, Objects, __init__, self, Methods
OOP û Inheritance, Polymorphism, Encapsulation
Modules, Packages, pip, virtualenv, PyPI
API Integration û requests, JSON, REST APIs
Revision + Mini Python Project (CLI App)
HTML5 û Structure, Semantic Tags, Forms, Tables
CSS3 û Box Model, Flexbox, Grid, Media Queries
Bootstrap 5 û Grid, Components, Utilities
JavaScript ES6 û Variables, Functions, DOM, Events
JavaScript û Fetch API, Promises, async/await
Django Intro û Install, Project Setup, MVC Pattern
Django URLs, Views, Templates, Context Variables
Django Models, ORM, SQLite, Admin Panel
Django Forms, CSRF, Validations, CRUD
Django User Auth û Register, Login, Logout, Sessions
Django Rest API Basics
React.js Basics û JSX, Components, Props, State
React Hooks basics
Git, GitHub, Deployment û Render / Pythonanywhere
Capstone Project: Full Stack App (Django + React)
